Kong Xiu еӯ”з§Җ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Kong Xiu (еӯ”з§Җ). One of the defenders of the Passes killed by Guan Yu. Kong Xiu is a fictional character. Kong Xiu was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
